entities.name: WATER DEFICITS

entities.description: The inorganic nitrogen available in the soil

entities.description: The spatial configuration of a plant's root system

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: A vital resource for plant growth

entities.name: SPLIT APPLICATION
entities.description: The strategy of applying nitrogen fertilizer in multiple smaller doses
